boundary_binding.action_boundary: Activation may not proceed when calibration evidence does not match the activation device group, site, release condition, and timing per policy.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Calibration packet CAL-ACR-022 covers DG-41B lab telemetry units at Site 18-L, but activation ACT-ACR-2026-8022 targets DG-41B production telemetry units at Site 18-P. Shared naming prefix DG-41B alone is insufficient per STD-ACR-022-P. Dependency evidence fails to match all required fields.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: CAL-ACR-022 evidence scope (lab, Site 18-L) does not satisfy ACT-ACR-022 requirements (production, Site 18-P).

critical_features_preserved: Mismatch between calibration evidence scope and activation scope
final_answer: The action must not proceed. Calibration packet CAL-ACR-022 covers DG-41B lab telemetry units at Site 18-L for release condition RC-7, while activation ACT-ACR-2026-8022 targets DG-41B production telemetry units at Site 18-P. Policy STD-ACR-022-P explicitly states that shared naming prefixes alone are insufficient; attached evidence must match device group, site, release condition, and timing before activation. The dependency gap remains unresolved.
open_blockers: Calibration evidence scope (DG-41B lab units at Site 18-L) mismatches activation scope (DG-41B production units at Site 18-P)
Shared device group prefix DG-41B is insufficient per policy STD-ACR-022-P
Activation requires calibration matching device group, site, release condition, and timing simultaneously
